resources.string: Restart app to fully apply language if needed.
Use your phone camera to look around the room. This app helps you find possible lens reflections.
Use your phone camera to look around the room.
This app helps you find possible lens reflections.
It cannot guarantee detection of all hidden cameras.
Camera permission is required to use real-time preview.
Possible lens reflection detected. Check manually.
This visual checking tool helps find possible lens reflections. It does not guarantee detection of all hidden cameras.

1. Slowly scan the room using your phone camera.
2. Look for small bright reflection points.
3. Check suspicious objects from different angles.
4. Use this app only as a visual checking tool.

Important:
This app helps you find possible lens reflections. It does not guarantee detection of all hidden cameras.

Hidden Camera Reflection Finder uses the device camera to help users visually check possible lens reflections.

Camera Permission:
The camera is used only for real-time preview and visual checking on the device.

Data Collection:
We do not collect, upload, sell, or share personal data.

Photos and Videos:
The app does not upload photos or videos to any server.

Account:
No account or login is required.

Backend:
The app does not use a backend server.

Limitation:
This app helps users find possible lens reflections. It does not guarantee detection of all hidden cameras.

Privacy Policy URL:
https://changhuliu.github.io/hidden-camera-reflection-finder/privacy-policy.html
Flashlight is not available on this device.
This device does not provide a magnetic field sensor.
Magnetic readings may be affected by metal objects, speakers, chargers, and other electronics. Use this only as a helper tool and check manually.
This app does not guarantee detection of all hidden cameras.
Use this checklist to inspect common places where small camera lenses may be hidden. Look for possible lens reflections and unusual openings.
This checklist is a visual inspection aid. It does not guarantee detection of all hidden cameras.
Check for unusual holes, off-center lenses, or bright reflections around the cover.
Inspect the clock face, numbers, and small openings near the center or edges.
Look for unusual pinholes, loose plates, or outlets that seem newly installed.
Check the front and sides for tiny dark openings or unexpected reflections.
Inspect vents and indicator areas. Electronics can also affect magnetic readings.
Look around bezels, set-top boxes, stands, and decorative devices near the TV.
Check the shade, base, and switch area for small holes or reflective points.
Inspect the frame and nearby objects. Look for reflections at different angles.
Look between slats for small lenses, wires, or unusual objects.
Check corners and dark areas of the frame for tiny openings.
Inspect decorative items, book spines, and objects facing the room.
Check vents, lights, and ceiling fixtures carefully from multiple angles.
Inspect clocks, chargers, lamps, and small objects pointed toward the bed.
